AC_VULTURE.name: Vulture's Eye
AC_VULTURE.description: Increases Attack Range and HIT with Bow class weapons.

AC_CONCENTRATION.name: Improve Concentration
AC_CONCENTRATION.description: Boosts AGI and DEX temporarily as well as detects nearby hidden characters in 3x3 AoE.

AC_DOUBLE.name: Double Strafe
AC_DOUBLE.description: Fires an arrow that will inflict double damage on target. The base range of this skill is 9 cells.

AC_SHOWER.name: Arrow Shower
AC_SHOWER.description: Fires an arrow at targeted cell damaging all enemies on 3x3 AoE. Enemies that receive damage will be knocked 2 cells backward. The base range of this skill is 9 cells.

AC_MAKINGARROW.name: Arrow Crafting
AC_MAKINGARROW.description: Creates Arrows from specific items. The kind of Arrows produced, as well as the amount, is determined by the items used.

AC_CHARGEARROW.name: Charge Arrow
AC_CHARGEARROW.description: Draws the bowstring to its limit to fire a volley of arrows which inflicts 150% ATK physical damage and with enough force to push the target 5 cells back.

AC_ETHARROW.name: Ethereal Arrow
AC_ETHARROW.description: Chance to deal 150% MATK on-hit damage when using bows.

HT_FALCON.name: Falconry Mastery
HT_FALCON.description: Enables taming of a Falcon. Increases Auto Blitz rate.

HT_BLITZBEAT.name: Blitz Beat
HT_BLITZBEAT.description: Commands Falcon to attack dealing damage based on your AGI and DEX. Learning the skill enables automatic attacks from the Falcon when wielding a Bow, increased by your LUK. The Falcon's range is 3 cells plus the level of Vulture's Eye skill.

HT_STEELCROW.name: Steel Crow
HT_STEELCROW.description: Increases the damage inflicted by Falcon.

HT_ANKLESNARE.name: Anklesnare
HT_ANKLESNARE.description: Sets a trap with a 3x3 range which will bind an enemy to the ground for the skill's duration, which is affected by the AGI of the target. Snared enemies are marked and have DEF/MDEF reduced 50%.

HT_LANDMINE.name: Land Mine
HT_LANDMINE.description: Trap that explodes when stepped upon, dealing physical damage. It has a 1000 base damage and increases damage by 500 every 10 STR. Deals further increased damage when wielding a dagger, influenced by Sword Mastery level. Has a chance to Stun equal to your DEX. Deals twice as much damage to poisoned enemies.

HT_SHOCKWAVE.name: Shockwave Trap
HT_SHOCKWAVE.description: Trap that explodes when stepped upon, dealing magic damage. It has a 1000 base damage and increases damage by 500 every 10 INT. Deals further increased magic damage when wielding a dagger, influenced by Sword Mastery level. Has a chance to Stun equal to your DEX. Deals twice as much damage to poisoned enemies.

HT_BLASTMINE.name: Blast Mine
HT_BLASTMINE.description: Trap that explodes after a delay and deals physical damage in a 7x7 AoE when triggered. It has a 750 base damage and increases damage by 150 per skill level and by 375 every 10 STR. Deals further increased damage when wielding a dagger, influenced by Sword Mastery level.

HT_FLASHER.name: Photon Trap
HT_FLASHER.description: Trap that explodes when triggered and deals magic damage in a 7x7 AoE. It has a 750 base damage and increases damage by 150 per skill level and by 375 every 10 INT. Deals further increased magic damage when wielding a dagger, influenced by Sword Mastery level.

HT_REMOVETRAP.name: Remove Trap
HT_REMOVETRAP.description: Removes a trap that has been set on the ground, as well as regain that Trap.

HT_SPRINGTRAP.name: Spring Trap
HT_SPRINGTRAP.description: Commands Falcon to remove a set Trap from a distance.

HT_DETECTING.name: Detect
HT_DETECTING.description: Commands a Falcon to detect hidden characters from a distance.

HT_MAGICFALCON.name: Mystical Taming
HT_MAGICFALCON.description: Empowers Falcon with mystical abilities, converting its damage to magical. Damage scales with INT instead of DEX.

HT_ROPEDART.name: Rope Dart
HT_ROPEDART.description: Attach rope to your dagger to deal ranged AoE damage (like Arrow Shower).

HT_SANDMAN.name: Acid Trap
HT_SANDMAN.description: Sets a trap with a 3x3 range that will cause the enemy that steps on it to receive physical or magic damage based on whether Mystical Falcon skill is learned or not. Also causes Poison status.

BA_MUSICALLESSON.name: Musical Lesson
BA_MUSICALLESSON.description: Increases Damage and Critical with music-related skills. Also increases MaxSP.

BA_FROSTJOKE.name: Frost Joke
BA_FROSTJOKE.description: Inflicts one debuff status to enemies within the caster's view. Success chance is based on 2/3 of INT status.

BA_DISSONANCE.name: Dissonance
BA_DISSONANCE.description: Dissonant music that damages and debuffs nearby enemies.

BA_ASSASSINCROSS.name: Assassin Cross of Sunset
BA_ASSASSINCROSS.description: Decreases the After Attack Delay of all players within the skill's range for 180 seconds. It does not stack with other Song skills.

BA_POEMBRAGI.name: Poem of Bragi
BA_POEMBRAGI.description: Reduces Variable Casting Time and After Skill Delay for all players within the skill's range for 180 seconds.

levels.effect: Variable Casting Time -2%, After Skill Delay -3%
Variable Casting Time -4%, After Skill Delay -6%
Variable Casting Time -6%, After Skill Delay -9%
Variable Casting Time -8%, After Skill Delay -12%
Variable Casting Time -10%, After Skill Delay -15%
Variable Casting Time -12%, After Skill Delay -18%
Variable Casting Time -14%, After Skill Delay -21%
Variable Casting Time -16%, After Skill Delay -24%
Variable Casting Time -18%, After Skill Delay -27%
Variable Casting Time -20%, After Skill Delay -30%

BA_PANGVOICE.name: Pang Voice
BA_PANGVOICE.description: Scream at an enemy so that it will receive twice as much damage from the next attack that hits it.

MI_RUSH_WINDMILL.name: Windmill Rush
MI_RUSH_WINDMILL.description: Increases Movement Speed and Attack Speed of caster for 180 seconds. Attack Speed is further increased by the Musical Lesson skill level.

MI_ECHOSONG.name: Echo Song
MI_ECHOSONG.description: Increases CRIT and FLEE based on Musical Lesson level and skill level for 180 seconds.

MI_HARMONIZE.name: Harmonize
MI_HARMONIZE.description: Increases ATK and MATK based on Musical Lesson level and skill level for 180 seconds.

BD_ADAPTATION.name: Adaptation to Circumstances
BD_ADAPTATION.description: Skill to cope with various unexpected situations occurring during performances. Reduces SP spent by 20% for Song, Dance and Ensemble skills over time. Can be used together with Encore.

BD_ENCORE.name: Encore
BD_ENCORE.description: Recasts the previous Song, Dance or Ensemble skill that was performed. Skills cast by Encore consume only half of the required SP. Encore will fail if the last Song, Dance or Ensemble is not available.

BD_RICHMANKIM.name: Mr. Kim A Rich Man
BD_RICHMANKIM.description: Increases the EXP rewarded by defeating monsters for 180 secs. It does not stack with other Ensemble skills.

BD_RINGNIBELUNGEN.name: The Ring of Nibelungen
BD_RINGNIBELUNGEN.description: Grants one of the following random buff to yourself and party members within the skill's range for 60 seconds.

BD_SIEGFRIED.name: Invulnerable Siegfried
BD_SIEGFRIED.description: Endows resistance to Fire, Water, Earth and Wind as well as tolerance to Blind, Frozen, Petrified, Stun, Curse, Sleep and Silence status for 180 seconds.

BD_ROKISWEIL.name: Loki's Wail
BD_ROKISWEIL.description: All Skills and magic spells, except yours, are disabled within the skill's range for 30 seconds.

CG_SPECIALSINGER.name: Skillful Professional Musician
CG_SPECIALSINGER.description: Gypsys and Clowns can immediately overcome the after effects of Ensemble skills which will occur.

CG_HERMODE.name: Hermode's Rod
CG_HERMODE.description: Empowers weapon with magical power, converting damage from Musical Strike, Throw Arrow, Arrow Vulcan and Performances to magical.

DC_DANCINGLESSON.name: Dancing Lesson
DC_DANCINGLESSON.description: Increases Whip class weapon damage. While the MaxSP bonus always applies, the ATK and Critical bonus only when a Whip class weapon is equipped.

DC_THROWARROW.name: Throw Arrow
DC_THROWARROW.description: Throws a powerful volley of arrows, even while using Dance skills, by using a Whip. The Arrow's element determines the element of this attack.

DC_UGLYDANCE.name: Ugly Dance
DC_UGLYDANCE.description: Perform a weird dance that disgusts everyone around the caster. Deals magic damage and slows affected targets.

DC_SCREAM.name: Scream
DC_SCREAM.description: Inflicts one debuff status to enemies within the caster's view. Success chance is based on 2/3 of INT status.

DC_FORTUNEKISS.name: Fortune's Kiss
DC_FORTUNEKISS.description: Increases Critical rate and Critical Damage of yourself and party members within this skill's range for 180 seconds.

DC_SERVICEFORYOU.name: Service For You
DC_SERVICEFORYOU.description: Increases MaxSP of yourself and party members within this skill's range and reduces their SP consumption for 180 seconds.

DC_WINKCHARM.name: Charming Wink
DC_WINKCHARM.description: Charms an enemy so that it will receive twice as much damage from the next attack that hits it.

WA_SWING_DANCE.name: Swing Dance
WA_SWING_DANCE.description: Increases Movement Speed and Attack Speed for 180 seconds. The bonus for Attack Speed is further increased by the Dancing Lesson skill level.

WA_SYMPHONY_OF_LOVER.name: Symphony of Lover
WA_SYMPHONY_OF_LOVER.description: Increases ATK and MATK based on Dancing Lesson level and skill level for 180 seconds.

WA_MOONLIT_SERENADE.name: Moonlight Serenade
WA_MOONLIT_SERENADE.description: Increases CRIT and FLEE based on Dancing Lesson level and skill level for 180 seconds.

BD_ADAPTATION.name: Adaptation to Circumstances
BD_ADAPTATION.description: Skill to cope with various unexpected situations occurring during performances. Reduces SP spent by 20% for Song, Dance and Ensemble skills over time.

BD_ENCORE.name: Encore
BD_ENCORE.description: Recasts the previous Song, Dance or Ensemble skill that was performed. Skills cast by Encore consume only half of the required SP.

BD_RICHMANKIM.name: Mr. Kim A Rich Man
BD_RICHMANKIM.description: Increases the EXP rewarded by defeating monsters for 180 secs.

BD_RINGNIBELUNGEN.name: The Ring of Nibelungen
BD_RINGNIBELUNGEN.description: Grants one of the following random buff to yourself and party members within the skill's range for 60 seconds.

BD_SIEGFRIED.name: Invulnerable Siegfried
BD_SIEGFRIED.description: Endows resistance to Fire, Water, Earth and Wind as well as tolerance to Blind, Frozen, Petrified, Stun, Curse, Sleep and Silence status for 180 seconds.

BD_ROKISWEIL.name: Loki's Wail
BD_ROKISWEIL.description: All Skills and magic spells, except yours, are disabled within the skill's range for 30 seconds.

CG_SPECIALSINGER.name: Skillful Professional Musician
CG_SPECIALSINGER.description: Dancers can immediately overcome the after effects of Ensemble skills which will occur.

SN_SIGHT.name: True Sight
SN_SIGHT.requirement: Owl's Eye 10, Vulture's Eye 10, Improve Concentration 10, Detect 1
SN_SIGHT.description: Adds +5 to all Stats, as well as increases HIT, Weapon damage and Critical.

SN_FALCONASSAULT.name: Falcon Assault
SN_FALCONASSAULT.requirement: Vulture's Eye 5, Falconry Mastery 1, Blitz Beat 5, Steel Crow 3
SN_FALCONASSAULT.description: Commands Falcon to attack an enemy with a mighty strike. Damage grows with skill level and Job Level equally.

SN_SHARPSHOOTING.name: Sharp Shooting
SN_SHARPSHOOTING.description: Shoots an arrow with incredible might directly towards a targeted enemy, inflicting ranged physical damage to it and surrounding enemies within 5x5 cells. Has a high chance to inflict half of the total Critical Damage and 50% of the caster's Critical chance will be added.

SN_WINDWALK.name: Wind Walk
SN_WINDWALK.description: Increases Movement Speed and FLEE rate of yourself and party members by 2 times the skill level.

HT_SANDMAN.name: Acid Trap
HT_SANDMAN.description: Sets a trap with a 3x3 range that will cause the enemy that steps on it to receive physical or magic damage based on whether Mystical Falcon skill is learned or not. Also causes Poison status.

CG_ARROWVULCAN.name: Arrow Vulcan
CG_ARROWVULCAN.requirement: Musical Strike 1 (Clown) / Throw Arrow 1 (Gypsy), Double Strafe 5, Arrow Shower 5
CG_ARROWVULCAN.description: Fires an awesome flurry of arrows at an targeted enemy. Requires Musical Instrument for Clown and Whip class weapon for Gypsy.

CG_TAROTCARD.name: Tarot Card of Fate
CG_TAROTCARD.requirement: Pang Voice 1 (Clown) / Charming Wink 1 (Gypsy), Improve Concentration 10
CG_TAROTCARD.description:
Draws one random Tarot card to trigger a unique effect.

Possible outcomes:
- The Magician: Taking action. Awareness. Deals 1000% MATK damage.
- The Tower: Accidents. Loss of command. Failure. Sudden changes. Loss of judgment. Deals 1000% ATK damage.
- The Chariot: Victory. Hard control. Deals fixed damage of 1000 per second and casts Close Confine.
- The Sun: Destruction of the land. Dissatisfaction. Chaos. Casts Solar Flare (3700% MATK).
- The Hanged Man: Letting go. Giving up. Sacrifice. Casts Final Strike.
- The Devil: Obsession. Danger of sickness. Inevitable curse. Hopelessness. Casts Soul Strike and inflicts Curse.
- Strength: Inner strength, courage, patience. Increases caster and ally Max HP by 1000.
- The High Priest: Withdrawal. Mystery. Casts Heal, Increase AGI, and Blessing on target.
- Wheel of Fortune: Destiny. Turning point. Movement. Randomly causes the effects of two other Tarot cards.
- Death: Ending. Bad luck. Unexpected catastrophe. Difficulty. Causes Poison. If already poisoned, deals 25% Max HP as damage. If HP is below 25%, inflicts Coma. Also has a 1% chance to inflict Coma at all times.
- The Fool: Mental disease. Beginning. Reduces enemy SP to 0 and applies Silence and Confusion.
- The Lovers: Farewell. Discovered cheating on someone. Teleports the enemy to a random location.
- Temperance: Impossible to control. Tiredness. Stubborn. Vanity. Causes Slow and ASPD reduction.
- The Star: Destruction of hope. Sad future. Chaos. Casts Shooting Star (2000% ATK).

CG_MARIONETTE.name: Marionette Control
CG_MARIONETTE.requirement: Musical Lesson 5 (Clown) / Dancing Lesson 5 (Gypsy), Improve Concentration 10
CG_MARIONETTE.description: Targeted party member receives a bonus to all Stats equal to half of the Stats of the caster. However, each of the target's Stats cannot exceed 99. This skill is canceled if this party member is more than 7 cells away from the caster.

CG_MOONLIT.name: Moonlit Water Mill (Sheltering Bliss)
CG_MOONLIT.requirement: Musical Lesson 7 (Clown) / Dancing Lesson 7 (Gypsy), Improve Concentration 5
CG_MOONLIT.description: Clown and Gypsy ensemble skill that creates an area around the casters where other players and monsters cannot enter. This skill cannot offer protection from magic or long ranged attacks. This skill cannot be cast in areas that are adjacent to obstacles.

CG_ARROWVULCAN.name: Arrow Vulcan
CG_ARROWVULCAN.requirement: Musical Strike 1, Double Strafe 5, Arrow Shower 5
CG_ARROWVULCAN.description: Fires an awesome flurry of arrows at an targeted enemy. Requires Musical Instrument for Clown.

CG_TAROTCARD.name: Tarot Card of Fate
CG_TAROTCARD.description:
Draws one random Tarot card to trigger a unique effect.

Possible outcomes:
- The Magician: Taking action. Awareness. Deals 1000% MATK damage.
- The Tower: Accidents. Loss of command. Failure. Sudden changes. Loss of judgment. Deals 1000% ATK damage.
- The Chariot: Victory. Hard control. Deals fixed damage of 1000 per second and casts Close Confine.
- The Sun: Destruction of the land. Dissatisfaction. Chaos. Casts Solar Flare (3700% MATK).
- The Hanged Man: Letting go. Giving up. Sacrifice. Casts Final Strike.
- The Devil: Obsession. Danger of sickness. Inevitable curse. Hopelessness. Casts Soul Strike and inflicts Curse.
- Strength: Inner strength, courage, patience. Increases caster and ally Max HP by 1000.
- The High Priest: Withdrawal. Mystery. Casts Heal, Increase AGI, and Blessing on target.
- Wheel of Fortune: Destiny. Turning point. Movement. Randomly causes the effects of two other Tarot cards.
- Death: Ending. Bad luck. Unexpected catastrophe. Difficulty. Causes Poison. If already poisoned, deals 25% Max HP as damage. If HP is below 25%, inflicts Coma. Also has a 1% chance to inflict Coma at all times.
- The Fool: Mental disease. Beginning. Reduces enemy SP to 0 and applies Silence and Confusion.
- The Lovers: Farewell. Discovered cheating on someone. Teleports the enemy to a random location.
- Temperance: Impossible to control. Tiredness. Stubborn. Vanity. Causes Slow and ASPD reduction.
- The Star: Destruction of hope. Sad future. Chaos. Casts Shooting Star (2000% ATK).

CG_MARIONETTE.name: Marionette Control
CG_MARIONETTE.description: Targeted party member receives a bonus to all Stats equal to half of the Stats of the caster.

CG_MOONLIT.name: Moonlit Water Mill (Sheltering Bliss)
CG_MOONLIT.description: Clown and Gypsy ensemble skill that creates an area around the casters where other players and monsters cannot enter.
